basic_details.job_title: MPMMCC Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for Field Investigator, Clinical Research Monitor and More Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Mahamana Pandit Madan Mohan Malviya Cancer Centre (MPMMCC)
basic_details.post_name: Field Investigator, Clinical Research Monitor, Clinical Research Coordinator
basic_details.short_information: Mahamana Pandit Madan Mohan Malviya Cancer Centre (MPMMCC) Field Investigator, Clinical Research Monitor, and Clinical Research Coordinator Recruitment 2026 Notification has been released on the official website . A total of 5 vacancies have been announced through the MPMMCC Recruitment 2026. Candidates aged up to 45 years who hold qualifications such as Graduate, M.Sc., M.Pharm, MBBS, BDS, or BAMS are eligible to apply for these positions. The walk-in interview for MPMMCC Recruitment 2026 will be held on 22 May 2026 and 26 May 2026. Candidates can download the official notification PDF and at

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 45 years for all posts.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate, M.Sc./M.Pharm with PG Diploma in Clinical Research, M.Sc, MBBS/BDS/BAMS/BHMS/BUMS/Pharm D with PG Diploma in Clinical Research, B.Sc./B.Pharm with PG Diploma in Clinical Research
qualification.details: Field Investigator: Any graduate with a minimum of 1-year experience in any health care setup. Desirable: Experience in Cancer screening in the field. Clinical Research Monitor: M.Sc./ M.Pharm (PG Diploma in Clinical Research is mandatory)/ M.Sc. in Clinical Research/ MBBS/ BDS/ BAMS/ BHMS/ BUMS (PG Diploma in Clinical Research is Mandatory) or Pharm D or Equivalent Qualification Clinical Research Monitor: M.Sc./ M.Pharm (PG Diploma in Clinical Research is mandatory) or M.Sc. in Clinical Research or Equivalent Qualification Clinical Research Coordinator: B.Sc./B. Pharm (PG Diploma in Clinical Research is mandatory) or Equivalent Qualification.

salary_details.clinical research monitor (yoga lung tri: ₹ 32,000/- to ₹ 40,000/- for M.Sc./M.Pharm; ₹ 50,000/- to ₹ 70,000/- for MBBS/BDS/Pharm D etc. (depending on experience)

selection_process: Walk-in Interview Written Test (if more candidates) Skill Test / Interview

faq.question: Q1. What is the total number of vacancies announced by MPMMCC?
faq.answer: Mahamana Pandit Madan Mohan Malviya Cancer Centre (MPMMCC) has announced a total of 5 vacancies for various posts through a walk-in interview process.

faq.question: Q2. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is Walk-in. Candidates are required to attend the interview directly at the specified venue and time.

faq.question: Q3. What is the maximum age limit for the candidates applying for MPMMCC recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all the posts announced under this recruitment is 45 years.

faq.question: Q4. What are the educational qualifications required for the Field Investigator post?
faq.answer: For the Field Investigator post, candidates must be any graduate with a minimum of 1-year experience in any health care setup. Experience in Cancer screening in the field is desirable.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary range for the Clinical Research Monitor posts?
faq.answer: The salary for Clinical Research Monitor posts varies. For M.Sc./M.Pharm, it ranges from ₹32,000/- to ₹40,000/-. For MBBS/BDS/Pharm D, it can range from ₹50,000/- to ₹70,000/-, depending on experience.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for MPMMCC recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process primarily involves a Walk-in Interview. A Written Test may be conducted if there are more candidates, followed by a Skill Test or Interview.

faq.question: Q8. Where is the location of the recruitment?
faq.answer: The recruitment is being conducted by Mahamana Pandit Madan Mohan Malviya Cancer Centre (MPMMCC) located in Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, with the pincode 221005.

faq.question: Q9. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original documents, one set of self-attested photocopies (ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates, category certificate if applicable), and a duly filled application form if required.

faq.question: Q10. When are the walk-in interviews scheduled?
faq.answer: The walk-in interviews are scheduled on 22 May 2026 for Field Investigator and on 26 May 2026 for Clinical Research Monitor and Clinical Research Coordinator posts.
